subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, cause every leaf of the Tree of Thy love to stir in this Ridván wherein the dove hath warbled its melody [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حرک یا الهی کل ورقه من اوراق سدره حبک فی هذا الرضوان الذی فیه تغردت ورقاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
